case_title: DEBRENIA MADISON VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MADISON, DEBRENIA

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADISON, DEBRENIA AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MADISON, DEBRENIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $47,575.83 PRINCIPAL, $476.19 INTEREST, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $48,387.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
